name: Pinto Beans with Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover the dried pinto beans with enough water to cover them and bring to a boil.
2. Reduce heat and simmer until the beans are just tender. Add the chopped potatoes, celery, and salt. If necessary, add more water to prevent the mixture from drying out.
3. Cook over low heat until the potatoes and beans are tender.
4. Just before the potatoes and beans are fully cooked, gently fry the sliced onion in a heavy skillet using peanut oil.
5. Using a slotted spoon, transfer the beans and onions to the skillet with the celery and cook until well mixed and heated through.
6. Serve hot over rice or a stiff porridge.
